---
title: "Descriptive"
---

Plot body darkness response variables - both are roughly normally distributed

```{r}

library(ggplot2)

d <- readRDS("_targets/objects/d_sp_cell")
ggplot(d, aes(x = black_20)) +
  geom_density(fill = "blue", alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(title = "Density Plot of Response",
       x = "Your Column",
       y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(d, aes(x = black_30)) +
  geom_density(fill = "blue", alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(title = "Density Plot of Response",
       x = "Your Column",
       y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal()
```

Plot number / distribution of species and a list of species

```{r}

library(taxize)

# Get unique species to minimize API calls
unique_species <- unique(d$species)

# Use GBIF's backbone taxonomy (good for animals)
classification_results <- classification(unique_species, db = "gbif")

# Extract family from each result
family_lookup <- sapply(classification_results, function(x) {
  if (is.data.frame(x)) {
    fam <- x$name[x$rank == "family"]
    if (length(fam) > 0) return(fam[1])
  }
  return(NA)
})

# Create lookup table and merge
lookup_df <- data.frame(
  species = unique_species,
  family = family_lookup
)

d <- merge(d, lookup_df, by = "species", all.x = TRUE)

d %>%
  distinct(species, family) %>%
  count(family) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(family, n), y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), hjust = -0.2, size = 3) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Number of species") +
  theme_minimal()

```

Testing for correlations between wing and body

```{r}

table(d$sex)
table(d$flight_type)
testGroupCor <- function(my_flight_type=NA,my_sex=NA,plot=FALSE){
  d_group <- d
  if(!is.na(my_flight_type)){
    d_group <- dplyr::filter(d_group, flight_type==my_flight_type)
  }
  if(!is.na(my_sex)){
    d_group <- dplyr::filter(d_group, sex==my_sex)
  }
  print(cor.test(d_group$percent_dark_or_darker_than_0.3,d_group$sp_sex_blackbrown_forehind))
  if(plot){
    ggplot(d_group, aes(x = percent_dark_or_darker_than_0.3, y = sp_sex_blackbrown_forehind)) + 
      geom_point() +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "blue") +
      xlab("Percent Dark or Darker than 0.3") + 
      ylab("Black/Brown Forehind") + ylim(0,0.65)
  }
}

testGroupCor("percher")
testGroupCor("flyer")
testGroupCor(my_sex="male")
testGroupCor(my_sex="female",plot=TRUE)
testGroupCor("flyer","male")
testGroupCor(my_sex="female",plot=TRUE)
testGroupCor(my_sex="male",plot=TRUE)
testGroupCor("percher","male",plot=TRUE)
testGroupCor("flyer","female")
testGroupCor("percher","female")

```

Check how many obs are missing sex

```{r}

sum(is.na(d$sex))
```

Check predictor correlations

```{r}

cor.test(d$srad,d$tmax)
cor.test(d$prism_tmean,d$tmax)

```

How many species with metallic color did we exclude? - 4 species and 60 species-cells

```{r}

d_unfilt <- readRDS("_targets/objects/d_sp_cell_clim")
d <- readRDS("_targets/objects/d_sp_cell")

nrow(d_unfilt) - nrow(d)

length(unique(d_unfilt$species)) - length(unique(d$species))
```
